title: Where Is Lily?
synopsis: Little Lily loves playing peek-a-boo with her diverse family members throughout their cozy home. Each page reveals a new hiding spot as family members search for giggly Lily, creating a warm, interactive experience perfect for babies learning about family bonds and the joy of being found.

illustration.description: A cozy living room with soft cream walls and pastel furniture. Mama, a warm-skinned woman with curly black hair in a yellow cardigan, looks around with a gentle smile and hands on her hips. Scattered colorful toys and a plush rainbow rug create a welcoming space. The composition shows questioning body language with soft morning light streaming through windows.
illustration.alt: Mama looking around the living room searching for Lily

illustration.description: Little Lily, a toddler with brown skin and two small pigtails tied with bright ribbon, peeks out from behind a sage green sofa with a huge delighted grin. Her dark eyes sparkle with mischief and joy. The sofa has soft rounded edges and plush cushions. Warm peach and coral tones fill the background with gentle watercolor washes.
illustration.alt: Lily hiding behind the green sofa with a big smile

illustration.description: Papa, a tall man with medium brown skin and a neat beard, wearing a soft blue sweater, searches the sunny kitchen. He has kind eyes and is opening cabinet doors with an exaggerated searching expression. The kitchen features warm wood tones, hanging plants, and colorful dish towels. Soft yellow light creates a cozy morning atmosphere.
illustration.alt: Papa searching in the kitchen cabinets for Lily

illustration.description: Lily crouches under a round wooden dining table, her hands covering her face in classic peek-a-boo pose. She wears a soft pink dress with tiny flower patterns. Her expression shows pure joy and anticipation. The table legs create interesting shadows, and a few scattered cheerios on the floor suggest recent snack time.
illustration.alt: Lily hiding under the dining table playing peek-a-boo

pages.text: Where is Lily? Shh, shh, quiet!

illustration.description: Grandma, an elderly woman with silver-gray hair in a soft bun and gentle wrinkles around smiling eyes, tiptoes through a hallway. She wears a lavender cardigan and has her finger to her lips in a 'shh' gesture. Family photos line the hallway walls showing diverse family moments. Soft afternoon light filters through a nearby window.
illustration.alt: Grandma tiptoeing quietly down the hallway looking for Lily

illustration.description: Lily pops up from a large wicker toy box filled with colorful stuffed animals and soft blocks. A teddy bear sits on her head and she's surrounded by pastel toys. Her expression is one of triumphant joy with arms raised high. The nursery background features soft mint green walls and a mobile with gentle shapes hanging overhead.
illustration.alt: Lily popping out of the toy box with toys around her

illustration.description: All three family members - Mama, Papa, and Grandma - stand together in the living room with exaggerated searching poses. They look behind cushions, under blankets, and around furniture. Each has a different searching gesture but all wear loving, playful expressions. The room is warmly lit with golden afternoon light creating a sense of togetherness.
illustration.alt: The whole family searching together in the living room

pages.text: Peek-a-boo! Here I am! Hugs for everyone!

illustration.description: A joyful group hug with Lily in the center, surrounded by Mama, Papa, and Grandma. All faces show pure love and happiness with rosy cheeks and bright smiles. Lily's arms are stretched wide welcoming the embrace. Warm golden light bathes the scene with soft pink and peach tones. Hearts and gentle sparkles float around the family, suggesting love and warmth.
illustration.alt: The whole family in a loving group hug with Lily in the center

metadata.illustrationStyle: Soft, rounded shapes with warm pastel colors. Gentle watercolor feel. Large, friendly faces. High contrast for baby eyes. Simple backgrounds.

questions.question: Where does Lily hide first?
questions.explanation: Lily first hides behind the sofa when Mama is looking for her.

questions.question: Who looks for Lily in the kitchen?
questions.explanation: Papa searches for Lily in the kitchen by opening the cabinets.

questions.question: What does Lily pop out of?
questions.explanation: Lily pops out of the toy box with toys all around her.
